business.label: Business
business.description: Core legal automation — case lifecycle, document pipeline, and AI approval flows. Triggered by domain events from FastAPI (case created, document uploaded, etc.).
business.activate: Yes — webhook workflows active in all environments

notifications.label: Notifications
notifications.description: Time-based reminders and escalations for pending attorney approvals and SLA breaches.

reports.label: Reports
reports.description: Scheduled operational digests for managing partners — pending work, failures, errors.

infra.label: Infrastructure
infra.description: Platform health monitoring — Redis, RabbitMQ, Celery, API. Creates incidents and alerts admins on failure.

test.label: Test
test.description: CI and local smoke workflows. Manual trigger only — never wired to production traffic.
test.activate: Manual only — do not enable for scheduled/webhook production traffic
